eniki.studio
Home About

This site is about my creations. It contains my artwork, my craftwork, and my professional design work. It may sometimes have snippets of thought and stories of others. But it mainly serves as a window to my world view.

What does eniki mean?

It's just a word I made up to represent my work and what I strive for: Celebrating craftsmanship with sustainability and compassion in mind.

Who am I?

I am a Systems Design Engineering graduate at the University of Waterloo. I design experiences at Duality. I spend my free time gardening, creating artwork, and playing video games. I don't think there's a lot so say about who I am, but I do have a few things to show about what I've made.

eniki.studio by Alena Delena © 2022
